query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_order.clients (
            id, tenant_id, name, corporation_number, address, representative,
            capital, industry, listed, founded, email, phone_number, fax_number,
            created_at, updated_at
        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
            name = VALUES(name), corporation_number = VALUES(corporation_number), address = VALUES(address), representative = VALUES(representative),
            capital = VALUES(capital), industry = VALUES(industry), listed = VALUES(listed), founded = VALUES(founded), email = VALUES(email),
            phone_number = VALUES(phone_number), fax_number = VALUES(fax_number), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
